title: ZXBrick Levels
description: Progress through 100 handcrafted levels in ZXBrick, each offering new layouts, greater challenges, and fresh opportunities to improve your skills.
summary: Every level introduces a new challenge, rewarding precision, quick reactions, and consistent play as you progress through ZXBrick.

sections.heading: 100 Handcrafted Levels
paragraphs: ZXBrick features 100 handcrafted levels, each designed to test your reactions, accuracy, and paddle control.
As you progress, you'll encounter new brick layouts and increasingly demanding challenges that reward skill and persistence.

sections.heading: Progress at Your Own Pace
paragraphs: Every completed level helps you become a stronger player. Take your time learning new layouts before moving on to more difficult stages.
If a level proves challenging, replaying it is a great way to improve your reactions, discover better strategies, and build confidence.

images.caption: Every level presents a new challenge.
Master each level to keep progressing.

featureShowcases.heading: A New Challenge Every Level
featureShowcases.summary: Every stage introduces fresh layouts and new opportunities to improve your arcade skills.
body: ZXBrick rewards players who learn from every game. As you progress through the 100 handcrafted levels, you'll develop faster reactions, better paddle control, and more effective strategies.
Whether you're aiming to complete every level or beat your highest score, each game helps you become a better player.
bullets: Perfect for improving reactions and precision.

image.caption: Every level helps you improve your skills.
